# Extended metrics upstream availability

Probe date: 2026-05-11.

Evidence source: public intervals.icu OpenAPI document at `https://intervals.icu/api/v1/docs` plus the documented endpoint schemas listed below. No local `.env`/credentials were used and no authenticated athlete payloads were committed. Fixtures in this directory are sanitized, schema-minimal examples that preserve only fields needed by tests and later tool shaping; they contain no API keys, raw athlete identifiers, exact activity IDs, GPS traces, free-text notes, or device serials.

Availability states:

- `yes`: directly exposed by a public API schema and safe to surface when present.
- `conditional`: directly exposed by a public API schema but only populated for qualifying sports/devices/activities; omit from `get_extended_metrics` responses when absent.
- `computed_not_allowed`: derivable from raw streams or zones but not directly exposed as the requested metric; do not compute in icuvisor.
- `not_observed`: plausible upstream/device feature, but no documented schema field or representative sample was available; do not expose until evidence is added.
- `no`: checked public endpoint schemas and no direct upstream field exists; drop from the tool.

Checked endpoint/query families for unavailable fields: `GET /api/v1/athlete/{id}/activities?oldest&newest&fields`, `GET /api/v1/activity/{id}?intervals=true|false`, `GET /api/v1/activity/{id}/intervals`, `GET /api/v1/activity/{id}/streams{ext}?types&includeDefaults`, `GET /api/v1/activity/{id}/power-vs-hr{ext}`, `GET /api/v1/athlete/{id}/athlete-summary{ext}?start&end`, `GET /api/v1/athlete/{id}/wellness{ext}?oldest&newest&fields`, `GET /api/v1/athlete/{id}/events{format}?oldest&newest&resolve`, `GET /api/v1/activity/{id}/best-efforts`, and `GET /api/v1/athlete/{id}/power-curves{ext}`.

Implementation rule for Step 3: expose only rows marked `yes` or `conditional`, and only emit a field when the upstream payload includes a non-null value. Drop `ground_contact_time_ms`, `vertical_oscillation_cm`, `ground_contact_time_balance_percent`, `core_temperature_c`, `hr_drift_percent`, and `cadence_by_zone`; do not zero-fill or derive them from raw streams.

| PRD candidate metric        | Proposed response key                 | Availability         | Endpoint/query evidence                                                                                                                                  | Upstream JSON pointer/key                                                                        | Unit or scale                                                        | Fixture                                                                                       | Notes / limitations                                                                                                                   |
| --------------------------- | ------------------------------------- | -------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Ground contact time         | `ground_contact_time_ms`              | not_observed         | Checked endpoint families above; `Activity`, `ActivityWithIntervals`, `Interval`, and `ActivityStream` schemas have no ground-contact/GCT key.           | n/a                                                                                              | ms                                                                   | n/a                                                                                           | Device stream may carry it under vendor-specific stream names, but no documented direct metric is exposed. Drop until observed.       |
| Vertical oscillation        | `vertical_oscillation_cm`             | not_observed         | Checked endpoint families above; no vertical-oscillation key in relevant schemas.                                                                        | n/a                                                                                              | cm                                                                   | n/a                                                                                           | Drop until a documented or observed upstream field exists.                                                                            |
| Stride length               | `stride_length_m`                     | conditional          | `GET /api/v1/activity/{id}`; `GET /api/v1/activity/{id}/intervals`                                                                                       | `/average_stride`; `/icu_intervals/0/average_stride`                                             | m (upstream numeric)                                                 | `activity-detail-extended.json`; `activity-intervals-extended.json`                           | Upstream names this `average_stride`; surface as stride length when present.                                                          |
| Ground contact time balance | `ground_contact_time_balance_percent` | not_observed         | Checked endpoint families above; no GCT-balance key in relevant schemas.                                                                                 | n/a                                                                                              | percent                                                              | n/a                                                                                           | Drop until observed.                                                                                                                  |
| DFA α1                      | `dfa_alpha1`                          | conditional          | `GET /api/v1/activity/{id}/intervals`; `GET /api/v1/activity/{id}?intervals=true`                                                                        | `/icu_intervals/0/average_dfa_a1`                                                                | unitless                                                             | `activity-intervals-extended.json`                                                            | Interval-level server/device metric; expose only when intervals carry it.                                                             |
| W' balance                  | `w_prime_balance_kj`                  | conditional          | `GET /api/v1/activity/{id}/intervals`; `GET /api/v1/activity/{id}?intervals=true`                                                                        | `/icu_intervals/0/wbal_start`; `/icu_intervals/0/wbal_end`                                       | J upstream; convert/display as kJ at response boundary if applicable | `activity-intervals-extended.json`                                                            | Direct interval W' balance start/end. Activity-level `icu_max_wbal_depletion` is a depletion summary, not current balance.            |
| Core temperature            | `core_temperature_c`                  | no                   | Checked endpoint families above; `average_temp`, `min_temp`, and `max_temp` are generic activity/weather temperature fields, not core temperature.       | n/a                                                                                              | °C                                                                   | n/a                                                                                           | Drop; do not alias ambient/device temp to core temp.                                                                                  |
| Cardiac decoupling / Pw:HR  | `cardiac_decoupling_percent`          | conditional          | `GET /api/v1/activity/{id}`; `GET /api/v1/activity/{id}/power-vs-hr{ext}`                                                                                | `/icu_power_hr`; `/decoupling`; `/powerHr`; `/powerHrFirst`; `/powerHrSecond`                    | ratio and percent                                                    | `activity-detail-extended.json`; `activity-power-vs-hr.json`                                  | Upstream exposes Pw:HR ratio and decoupling summary directly.                                                                         |
| HR drift %                  | `hr_drift_percent`                    | computed_not_allowed | Checked endpoint families above; power-vs-HR decoupling exists, but no HR-drift-specific field is returned.                                              | n/a                                                                                              | percent                                                              | n/a                                                                                           | Could be derived from HR stream segments; do not compute.                                                                             |
| Aerobic decoupling          | `aerobic_decoupling_percent`          | conditional          | `GET /api/v1/activity/{id}`; `GET /api/v1/activity/{id}/power-vs-hr{ext}`                                                                                | `/decoupling`; `/decoupling`                                                                     | percent                                                              | `activity-detail-extended.json`; `activity-power-vs-hr.json`                                  | Use the upstream `decoupling` metric when present.                                                                                    |
| Power-zone distribution     | `power_zone_distribution`             | conditional          | `GET /api/v1/activity/{id}`; `GET /api/v1/athlete/{id}/athlete-summary{ext}`                                                                             | `/icu_zone_times`; `/timeInZones`                                                                | seconds by zone                                                      | `activity-detail-extended.json`; `athlete-summary-zones.json`                                 | Upstream array order follows athlete zone configuration.                                                                              |
| Pace-zone time              | `pace_zone_time`                      | conditional          | `GET /api/v1/activity/{id}`                                                                                                                              | `/pace_zone_times`; `/gap_zone_times`; `/use_gap_zone_times`                                     | seconds by zone                                                      | `activity-detail-extended.json`                                                               | Include GAP zone fields only when upstream marks GAP zone times in use.                                                               |
| Cadence-by-zone             | `cadence_by_zone`                     | computed_not_allowed | Checked endpoint families above; only Z2 cadence summaries (`icu_cadence_z2`, `medianCadenceZ2`, `avgCadenceZ2`) are exposed, not cadence per all zones. | n/a                                                                                              | cadence by zone                                                      | n/a                                                                                           | Do not compute from streams.                                                                                                          |
| Joules above FTP            | `joules_above_ftp_kj`                 | conditional          | `GET /api/v1/activity/{id}`; `GET /api/v1/activity/{id}/intervals`; `GET /api/v1/athlete/{id}/events{format}`                                            | `/icu_joules_above_ftp`; `/icu_intervals/0/joules_above_ftp`; `/0/joules_above_ftp`              | J upstream; present as kJ if shaped                                  | `activity-detail-extended.json`; `activity-intervals-extended.json`; `events-compliance.json` | Direct activity/interval/planned-event value.                                                                                         |
| Intensity factor            | `intensity_factor`                    | conditional          | `GET /api/v1/activity/{id}`; `GET /api/v1/athlete/{id}/events{format}`                                                                                   | `/icu_intensity`; `/0/icu_intensity`                                                             | ratio                                                                | `activity-detail-extended.json`; `events-compliance.json`                                     | Upstream field is named `icu_intensity`; expose as IF when present.                                                                   |
| Variability index           | `variability_index`                   | conditional          | `GET /api/v1/activity/{id}`                                                                                                                              | `/icu_variability_index`                                                                         | ratio                                                                | `activity-detail-extended.json`                                                               | Direct activity summary.                                                                                                              |
| Polarization index          | `polarization_index`                  | conditional          | `GET /api/v1/activity/{id}`                                                                                                                              | `/polarization_index`                                                                            | unitless                                                             | `activity-detail-extended.json`                                                               | Direct activity summary.                                                                                                              |
| TRIMP                       | `trimp`                               | conditional          | `GET /api/v1/activity/{id}`                                                                                                                              | `/trimp`                                                                                         | score                                                                | `activity-detail-extended.json`                                                               | Direct activity summary.                                                                                                              |
| Strain score                | `strain_score`                        | conditional          | `GET /api/v1/activity/{id}`; `GET /api/v1/activity/{id}/intervals`; `GET /api/v1/athlete/{id}/events{format}`                                            | `/strain_score`; `/icu_intervals/0/strain_score`; `/0/strain_score`                              | score                                                                | `activity-detail-extended.json`; `activity-intervals-extended.json`; `events-compliance.json` | Direct summary and interval/event field.                                                                                              |
| HR load                     | `hr_load`                             | conditional          | `GET /api/v1/activity/{id}`                                                                                                                              | `/hr_load`; `/hr_load_type`                                                                      | load score + type                                                    | `activity-detail-extended.json`                                                               | Direct activity summary.                                                                                                              |
| Pace load                   | `pace_load`                           | conditional          | `GET /api/v1/activity/{id}`                                                                                                                              | `/pace_load`; `/pace_load_type`                                                                  | load score + type                                                    | `activity-detail-extended.json`                                                               | Direct activity summary.                                                                                                              |
| Power load                  | `power_load`                          | conditional          | `GET /api/v1/activity/{id}`                                                                                                                              | `/power_load`; `/icu_training_load`                                                              | load score                                                           | `activity-detail-extended.json`                                                               | Direct activity summary; `icu_training_load` remains available as total training load.                                                |
| Left/right balance          | `left_right_balance_percent`          | conditional          | `GET /api/v1/activity/{id}`; `GET /api/v1/activity/{id}/intervals`                                                                                       | `/avg_lr_balance`; `/icu_intervals/0/avg_lr_balance`                                             | percent                                                              | `activity-detail-extended.json`; `activity-intervals-extended.json`                           | Direct activity/interval field.                                                                                                       |
| RPE                         | `rpe`                                 | conditional          | `GET /api/v1/activity/{id}`                                                                                                                              | `/icu_rpe`                                                                                       | subjective scale, upstream integer                                   | `activity-detail-extended.json`                                                               | Activity subjective field.                                                                                                            |
| Feel                        | `feel`                                | conditional          | `GET /api/v1/activity/{id}`                                                                                                                              | `/feel`                                                                                          | 1-5 per PRD scale metadata                                           | `activity-detail-extended.json`                                                               | Activity subjective field; wellness also has subjective scales but not this exact structured activity field in the documented schema. |
| Session RPE                 | `session_rpe`                         | conditional          | `GET /api/v1/activity/{id}`; `GET /api/v1/athlete/{id}/athlete-summary{ext}`                                                                             | `/session_rpe`; `/0/srpe`                                                                        | score                                                                | `activity-detail-extended.json`; `athlete-summary-zones.json`                                 | Direct activity/summary field.                                                                                                        |
| Compliance %                | `compliance_percent`                  | conditional          | `GET /api/v1/activity/{id}` plus event pairing context from `GET /api/v1/athlete/{id}/events{format}`                                                    | `/compliance`; `/paired_event_id`; event `/0/load_target` and `/0/icu_training_load`             | percent                                                              | `activity-detail-extended.json`; `events-compliance.json`                                     | Activity exposes computed compliance directly when paired to a planned event.                                                         |
| Device name                 | `device_name`                         | conditional          | `GET /api/v1/activity/{id}`                                                                                                                              | `/device_name`; related `/power_meter` is available but serials must not be surfaced by default. | string                                                               | `activity-detail-extended.json`                                                               | Surface device name only; keep serial/battery details out unless a future tool explicitly needs them.                                 |
